channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Update on Ocean Observatories Initiative
item.description: The NSF acknowledges concerns from stakeholders who rely on Ocean Observatories Initiative data and is addressing them.

item.title: Ancient DNA shows plague killed humans 5,500 years ago
item.description: Plague was a deadly killer 5,500 years ago, predating cities, farming, and the rat-infested conditions linked to later outbreaks.

item.title: Significant errors identified in Climate TRACE database founded by Al Gore
item.description: A Northern Arizona University study raises concerns about the accuracy of the widely used Climate TRACE emissions database.

item.title: Scientists identify earthquake gate as California faults reach highest stress in 1,000 years
item.description: A study finds Southern California's fault system is under more stress than at any time in the past millennium.
